name: Allen Vizzutti
abstract: Allen Vizzutti (born September 13, 1952) is an American trumpeter, composer and music educator.

concerts.label: Woody Herman and His Thundering Herd: 40th Anniversary Concert

about_quotes.speaker: Woody Herman
about_quotes.evidence: Alan Vizzutti, who I think is one of the outstanding sheer legitimate trumpet players that I've ever heard in my entire life.

about_quotes.speaker: Pete Candoli
about_quotes.evidence: I said, “You know there’s a guy by the name of Alan Vizzutti, he’s just phenomenal.”
about_quotes.doc_title: Pete Candoli interviewed by Monk Rowe, Los Angeles, California, February 15, 1999
